flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Centralia College fell 15% between 2008 and 2011 (62.5% → 53.0%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Centralia College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.8k → $5.3k).
